name: Mixed Vegetables Jaipur-Style
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine cumin and coriander in a small skillet. Dry-roast over medium heat for 6 to 8 minutes. Remove and set aside.
2. Heat oil in the same pan. Add onion and stir-fry until brown. Stir in the fried onion, tomato paste, nuts, and half of the half-and-half. Blend into a smooth paste and set aside.
3. Heat ghee in a heavy 2-quart saucepan over medium-high heat. Add cloves, cardamom, and cinnamon. Stir until fragrant.
4. Add tomatoes and cook until soft. Add remaining vegetables and stir-fry for 5 minutes.
5. Stir in the ground paste, remaining half-and-half, water, cayenne, salt, and raisins. Cover and cook over medium heat until vegetables are tender.
6. Garnish with mint sprigs and serve.
Serves 4 to 6.
